content:
type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Fixing IDCG calculation in NDCG metric to use expected relevant docs count instead of retrieved docs count

fields.summary: Fixing IDCG calculation in NDCG metric to use expected relevant docs count instead of retrieved docs count

content:
type: ANSWER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: IDCG fix: in NDCG.compute, replaced 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' with idcg computed directly over range(1, len(expected_ids) + 1) -- i.e. idcg = sum(discounted_gain(rel=True, i=i, mode=mode) for i in range(1, len(expected_ids) + 1)); removed the old ideal_length variable and its comment entirely. DCG calc (lines above, iterating retrieved_ids) and everything else untouched, so your relevance_scores work can build on top of this idcg definition without conflict.

fields.summary: IDCG fix: in NDCG.compute, replaced 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' with idcg computed directly over range(1, len(expected_ids) + 1) -- i.e. idcg = sum(discounted_gain(rel=True, i=i, mode=mode) for i in range(1, len(expected_ids) + 1)); removed the old ideal_length variable and its comment entirely. DCG calc (lines above, iterating retrieved_ids) and everything else untouched, so your relevance_scores work can build on top of this idcg definition without conflict.
